description: The GrabWorldLocomotion component can be used to make a locomotion for a world or injected into a user from an avatar or tooltip.

fields.ActivationThreshold: The primary strength from the user before activation.
fields.DeactivationThreshold: The primary strength from the user before deactivation.
fields._visual: the slot of the cross mesh visual used when moving.
fields._crossMesh: The cross mesh that should appear at the user's hand whenever moving with this locomotion.
fields._material: The material applied to the cross mesh visual.

usage: Can be used by making this locomotion active via the context menu. When used as a locomotion, it can allow for fine turning by pressing left and right and fine translational precision control by pressing forward on the joystick.
